summary: Iteration 15 - Subscription plan upgrade/downgrade with Stripe checkout, featured beats carousel on landing page, pricing page shows current plan for logged-in users. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - minor Recharts sizing issue, does not affect functionality (carried over from iteration 14)

passed_tests: GET /api/subscriptions/plans - returns free/rise/pro plans with correct structure
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade?plan=rise - upgrades user plan successfully
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade?plan=pro - upgrades user plan successfully
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade?plan=free - downgrades user plan successfully
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade?plan=invalid - returns 400 for invalid plan
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade - returns 401 without auth
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (rise) - creates Stripe checkout URL
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (pro) - creates Stripe checkout URL
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (free) - instant downgrade without Stripe
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (invalid) - returns 400
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout - returns 401 without auth
GET /api/beats - returns beats (public, no auth required)
GET /api/beats?limit=4 - returns limited beats for featured section
GET /api/health - returns healthy status
POST /api/auth/login - admin login successful
Frontend: Landing page loads with KALMORI logo
Frontend: Featured Beats section shows 4 beats from /api/beats
Frontend: Play buttons have data-testid attributes and work
Frontend: BROWSE ALL BEATS button navigates to /instrumentals
Frontend: Pricing page shows 3 plans (Free, Rise, Pro)
Frontend: Pricing page shows 'Current plan: PRO' badge for logged-in admin
Frontend: Pricing page shows UPGRADE/DOWNGRADE/CURRENT PLAN buttons correctly
Frontend: Upgrade/Downgrade buttons redirect to Stripe checkout for paid plans
Frontend: Free plan downgrade happens instantly without Stripe
Frontend: Back button on pricing page works
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription checkout endpoint correctly creates Stripe checkout sessions for paid plans
Free plan downgrade bypasses Stripe and updates user plan immediately
PricingPage.jsx correctly shows UPGRADE/DOWNGRADE/CURRENT PLAN based on user's current plan
Featured Beats section on landing page auto-pulls from /api/beats with limit=4
All play buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo beats from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested subscription upgrade/downgrade with Stripe checkout. Admin user is on 'pro' plan. Stripe checkout creates real checkout URLs (using test key sk_test_emergent). Free plan downgrade happens instantly without Stripe. Featured Beats section on landing page shows 4 beats from /api/beats. 6 demo beats in catalog: Midnight Drip, Golden Hour, City Lights, Lagos Nights, Sunday Morning, Neon Dreams.

mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending is skipped (no API key)
mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test API key (sk_test_emergent) - creates real checkout URLs

subscription_features_verified.plans_endpoint: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns free/rise/pro with prices and features
subscription_features_verified.checkout_endpoint: POST /api/subscriptions/checkout creates Stripe checkout for paid plans, instant downgrade for free

pricing_page_ui.not_logged_in: Shows GET STARTED buttons for all plans
pricing_page_ui.logged_in: Shows Current plan badge, UPGRADE/DOWNGRADE/CURRENT PLAN buttons based on user's plan

subscription_features_verified.stripe_integration: Checkout redirects to https://checkout.stripe.com with correct amount ($9.99 for Rise, $19.99 for Pro)

featured_beats_verified.landing_page_section: Featured Beats section visible with 4 beats
